EyeClick's interactive projection system is purpose-built for senior engagement - it projects games and activities directly onto floors and walls, requiring no hand-held devices, making it ideal for residents with limited mobility or cognitive decline. EyeClick offers something unique for your special education clients: interactive floor projection that requires zero hand-held devices.
